characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, light complexion, short dark hair, dark beard.
characters.demeanor: Relaxed, lying down, slightly hesitant but eager to learn.

characters.appearance: 3D animated young adult male, light complexion, curly dark hair, wearing black-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Purple and white floral short-sleeve shirt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Myself Rahul. [Myself Rahul.]
Character B says: क्या आप कहना चाहते हैं, "My name is Rahul"? [Do you mean to say, "My name is Rahul"?]
Character A says: Sorry... my English weak. [Sorry... my English weak.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं! क्या आप कहना चाहते हैं, "My English is a bit weak"? [No problem! Do you mean to say, "My English is a bit weak"?]
Character A says: हाँ, yes. [Yes, yes.]
Character B says: बहुत बढ़िया। आपने पिछले कुछ महीनों में कितनी बार English में बात की है? [Very good. How many times have you spoken in English in the last few months?]
Character A says: सच कहूँ तो... कभी नहीं। [To be honest... never.]
Character B says: आप बिल्कुल सही जगह पर हैं। Supernova पर हम रोज़ practice करेंगे, और आपका confidence जल्दी ही बढ़ जाएगा। [You are in exactly the right place. We will practice every day on Supernova, and your confidence will increase very soon.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a relatable, low-confidence learner making common Indian-English mistakes.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's gentle, non-judgmental correction style in a familiar Hindi-English mix.
- Highlights the core problem (lack of speaking practice) and introduces Supernova as the supportive daily practice solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
🇬🇧 🇬🇧 🇬🇧 🇬🇧 🇬🇧
Myself Rahul.

Sorry... my English weak.

हाँ, yes.
बहुत बढ़िया। आपने पिछले कुछ महीनों में कितनी बार English में बात की है?
सच कहूँ तो... कभी नहीं।
आप बिल्कुल सही जगह पर हैं। Supernova पर हम रोज़ practice करेंगे, और आपका confidence जल्दी ही बढ़ जाएगा।

scenes.scene_summary:
- Displays the Supernova brand logo and app store badges.
- Serves as the final call-to-action to download the app.
